name: wobbleLoop
purpose: Endloses Wackeln — kontinuierliches Hin-und-Her aus Verschiebung und Drehung (translateX + rotate; compositor-guenstig).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-wobbleLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-wobbleLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: translateX(-{{css params.distance}}) rotate(-{{css params.angle}}deg) } to { transform: translateX({{css params.distance}}) rotate({{css params.angle}}deg) } }
